Competition example using phaseR

1 Load libraries

library(package = "deSolve")
library(package = "phaseR")
## -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## phaseR: Phase plane analysis of one- and two-dimensional autonomous ODE systems
## -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## 
## v.2.1: For an overview of the package's functionality enter: ?phaseR
## 
## For news on the latest updates enter: news(package = "phaseR")

2 Create ode() function and parameters

comp <- function(t, y, parms) {
  with(as.list(c(y, parms)), {
    dN1 <- r1*N1/K1*(K1 - N1 - alpha12*N2)
    dN2 <- r2*N2/K2*(K2 - N2 - alpha21*N1)
    return(list(c(dN1, dN2)))
  })
}

time_start <- 0
time_end <- 100
time_steps <- 1e4

time_seq <- seq(from = time_start, to = time_end, length.out = time_steps)

var_names <- c("N1", "N2")

init_dens <- c(0.1, 0.2)
 names(init_dens) <- var_names

parm_vec <- c(r1 = 0.5, 
              r2 = 0.5,
              K1 = 1,
              K2 = 1,
              alpha12 = 1.5,
              alpha21 = 1.5)

3 Plot!

plot_lims <- c(-0.1, 1.1)

par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 0.1, 0.1))

trash <- flowField(deriv = comp, xlim = plot_lims, ylim = plot_lims, parameters = parm_vec, state.names = var_names, points = 26, arrow.head = 0.025, arrow.type = "equal", las = 1, add = F)

trash <- nullclines(deriv = comp, xlim = plot_lims, ylim = plot_lims, parameters = parm_vec, state.names = var_names, points = 500, col = c("red", "blue"), add = T)

trash <- trajectory(deriv = comp, y0 = init_dens, parameters = parm_vec, tlim = c(time_start, time_end), state.names = var_names)
